questions.q: In June 2026, successful diplomatic talks between the United States and which country were held in Switzerland?
questions.urdu: جون 2026 میں سوئٹزرلینڈ میں امریکہ اور کس ملک کے درمیان کامیاب سفارتی مذاکرات ہوئے؟
questions.explanation: The Islamabad Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) signed between the US and Iran on June 17, 2026, established a 60-day timeframe.

questions.q: Which terrorist group attacked Karachi Rangers Camp on 27 June 2026?
questions.urdu: ستائیس جون 2026 کو کراچی رینجرز کیمپ پر کس دہشت گرد گروپ نے حملہ کیا؟
questions.explanation: The terrorist group Jamaat-ul-Ahrar, a militant faction of the Tehreek-e-Taliban Pakistan (TTP), claimed responsibility for the attack on the Pakistan Rangers camp in Karachi's Gulistan-i-Jauhar area on June 27, 2026.

questions.q: Which South American country in 2026 experienced powerful earthquakes of magnitudes 7.2 and 7.5, considering one of the most intense in a century?
questions.urdu: دو ہزار چھبیس میں کس جنوبی امریکی ملک نے سات پوائنٹ دو اور سات پوائنٹ پانچ کی شدت کے طاقتور زلزلوں کا تجربہ کیا، جو کہ ایک صدی کے سب سے شدید زلزلوں میں سے ایک ہے؟

questions.q: Lionel Messi has become the highest goal scorer in FIFA world cup. Which team does he play for?
questions.urdu: لیونل میسی فیفا ورلڈ کپ میں سب سے زیادہ گول کرنے والے کھلاڑی بن گئے ہیں۔ وہ کس ٹیم کے لیے کھیلتا ہے؟
questions.explanation: Lionel Messi scored the first World Cup hat-trick of his career against Algeria during Argentina's opening match of the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

questions.q: Where was the 2025 Gaza peace summit held?
questions.urdu: دو ہزار پچیس  غزہ امن اجلاس کہاں منعقد ہوا تھا؟
questions.explanation: The 2025 Gaza Peace Summit (also known as the Sharm El-Sheikh Peace Summit) was held in Sharm El Sheikh, Egypt.

questions.q: Who is the current Federal Minister of Petroleum Division?

questions.explanation: The current Federal Minister of Petroleum Division is Ali Pervaiz Malik.

questions.q: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif addressed the passing-out ceremony at which institution on 27 June 2026?

questions.explanation: Prime Minister Muhammad Shehbaz Sharif attended the passing out ceremony of 125th Midshipmen and 33rd SSC courses at Pakistan Naval Academy, PNS Rahbar in Karachi on 27 June 2026.

questions.q: Which party formed government in Gilgit-Baltistan after winning the most seats in the June 2026 elections?

questions.explanation: The party that won the most seats in the 2026 Gilgit-Baltistan Assembly election was the Pakistan Peoples Party (PPP).

questions.q: Prime Minister of which country Keir Starmer  resigned from his post in 2026?
questions.urdu: کس ملک کے وزیر اعظم کیر اسٹارمر نے 2026 میں اپنے عہدے سے استعفیٰ دیا تھا؟
questions.explanation: On 22 June 2026, Keir Starmer announced that he would resign as both Prime Minister of the United Kingdom and leader of the Labour Party, less than two years after leading Labour to a landslide election victory in 2024.

questions.q: Which castle of Lebanon was captured by Israel in 2026?

questions.q: International Cricket Council (ICC) suspended membership of which country's cricket board in 2026?

questions.explanation: The International Cricket Council (ICC) suspended Cricket Canada with immediate effect on 1 June 2026 after finding what it called “serious breaches of its membership obligations.”

questions.q: On which date was the Israel–Lebanon Framework Agreement signed?

questions.explanation: Israel and Lebanon signed a framework agreement in Washington, USA on 26 June 2026.

questions.q: Against which country did Lionel Messi score the goals to become the all- time leading scorer in men's FIFA World Cup history during the 2026 edition?

questions.explanation: Lionel Messi scored the first World Cup hat-trick of his career against Algeria during Argentina's opening match of the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

questions.q: In which country has emergency been declared in June 2026 after devastating earthquakes?

questions.explanation: On 24 June  2026, northern Venezuela was struck by catastrophic back-to-back twin earthquakes measuring magnitudes of 7.2 and 7.5, marking the country's most powerful seismic event in over a century.

questions.q: Which edition of United Nations International Day in Support of Victims of Torture observed in 2026?
questions.urdu: دو ہزار چھبیس میں تشدد کے متاثرین کی حمایت میں اقوام متحدہ کے بین الاقوامی دن کا کون سا ایڈیشن منایا گیا؟
questions.explanation: International Day in Support of Victims of Torture is observed annually across the globe on 26 June to raise global awareness about the absolute prohibition of torture, support victims and survivors.

questions.q: On what date the International Day in Support of Victims of Torture is observed?

questions.explanation: International Day in Support of Victims of Torture is observed annually across the globe on 26 June to raise global awareness about the absolute prohibition of torture, support victims and survivors.

questions.q: Which country brokered Israel–Lebanon Framework Agreement in June 2026?

questions.explanation: Israel and Lebanon signed a framework agreement in Washington, USA on 26 June 2026.

questions.q: In June 2026, Israel and Lebanon signed a trilateral framework agreement. In which city was this pact officially signed?

questions.explanation: Israel and Lebanon signed a framework agreement in Washington, USA on 26 June 2026.

questions.q: Which international administration mediated and hosted the June 2026 Israel-Lebanon framework agreement?

questions.explanation: Israel and Lebanon signed a framework agreement in Washington, USA on 26 June 2026.

questions.q: When is International Day of Women in Diplomacy celebrated?

questions.q: The Ukraine Recovery Conference in 2026 held in which country?

questions.q: Which type of machine learning uses labeled data?

questions.q: What does 'AI' stand for?
questions.urdu: اس سوال کو وضاحت کے ساتھ پڑھیں
questions.explanation: AI stands for Artificial Intelligence, the simulation of human intelligence by machines.

questions.q: Who is widely regarded as the 'Father of Artificial Intelligence'?
questions.urdu: اس سوال کو وضاحت کے ساتھ پڑھیں
questions.explanation: John McCarthy coined the term 'Artificial Intelligence' in 1956 at the Dartmouth Conference.

questions.q: The Turing Test is used to evaluate a machine's ability to:
questions.urdu: اس سوال کو وضاحت کے ساتھ پڑھیں
questions.explanation: The Turing Test measures whether a machine can exhibit behavior indistinguishable from a human.

questions.q: Which of the following is an example of Narrow AI?
questions.urdu: اس سوال کو وضاحت کے ساتھ پڑھیں
questions.explanation: Narrow AI performs a single specific task, like filtering spam emails.

questions.q: Which programming language is most commonly used in AI development?
questions.urdu: اس سوال کو وضاحت کے ساتھ پڑھیں
questions.explanation: Python is the most popular AI language due to libraries like TensorFlow and PyTorch.

questions.q: What is a 'neuron' in an artificial neural network?
questions.urdu: اس سوال کو وضاحت کے ساتھ پڑھیں
questions.explanation: An artificial neuron is the basic computational unit that processes weighted inputs.

questions.q: Which of these is NOT a category of machine learning?
questions.urdu: اس سوال کو وضاحت کے ساتھ پڑھیں
questions.explanation: The three main categories are supervised, unsupervised, and reinforcement learning.

questions.q: What does 'ML' stand for in AI?
questions.urdu: اس سوال کو وضاحت کے ساتھ پڑھیں
questions.explanation: ML stands for Machine Learning, a subset of AI that learns from data.

questions.q: Which AI system defeated the world chess champion Garry Kasparov in 1997?
questions.urdu: اس سوال کو وضاحت کے ساتھ پڑھیں
questions.explanation: IBM's Deep Blue defeated Garry Kasparov in chess in 1997.
